headline: Countdown to DTE Energy (DTE) Q1 Earnings: Wall Street Forecasts for Key Metrics
summary: Beyond analysts' top-and-bottom-line estimates for DTE Energy (DTE), evaluate projections for some of its key metrics to gain a better insight into how the business might have performed for the quarter ended March 2026.
